items.title: A Look At UnitedHealth Group’s Valuation After Prolonged Share Price Weakness
items.description: UnitedHealth Group: recent share performance and business scale UnitedHealth Group (UNH) has seen its share price under pressure recently, with negative returns over the past week, month, past 3 months, year, and on a 3 year and 5 year basis. At a last close of US$282.34, UnitedHealth Group reported annual revenue of about US$447.6b and net income of roughly US$12.1b, reflecting the scale of its diversified health care operations.
